snippet: LLM agent frameworks are converging on event-driven architectures. LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen all moving toward graph-based agent orchestration. The trend makes debugging agents possible.
author: lena.bsky.social

snippet: Observability for LLM agents is the unsexy but critical trend nobody talks about. LangSmith, Langfuse, Braintrust — you cannot run agents in production without tracing.
author: matt.bsky.social
